data.body: Confirmed the root cause + workaround: re-running review-plan on child 2711 (31 previously-indeterminate) with REBAR_LLM_MAX_TOKENS=64000 (up from DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS=16000) let the verify step COMPLETE — verify_failed=None, indeterminate=0, and it returned a real BLOCK verdict with confirmed findings. This proves the truncation is the per-call output cap on the agentic verify step, and that scaling it (per the AC) resolves the INDETERMINATE degradation. 16000 is insufficient for ~30-finding container/cutover plans.
